'''dhajotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylophonist|xylophonist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylophonist|xylophonist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhajotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæjetheth|dhæjetheth]] || [[word:dhæjethej|dhæjethej]] || [[word:dhæjethesh|dhæjethesh]] || [[word:dhæjethe|dhæjethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajojothoth|dhajojothoth]] || [[word:dhajojothoj|dhajojothoj]] || [[word:dhajojothosh|dhajojothosh]] || [[word:dhajojotho|dhajojotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajothoth|dhajothoth]] || [[word:dhajothoj|dhajothoj]] || [[word:dhajothosh|dhajothosh]] || [[word:dhajotho|dhajotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajofthoth|dhajofthoth]] || [[word:dhajofthoj|dhajofthoj]] || [[word:dhajofthosh|dhajofthosh]] || [[word:dhajofthof|dhajofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhajothotho|dhajothotho]] || [[word:dhajothojo|dhajothojo]] || [[word:dhajothosho|dhajothosho]] || [[word:dhajothoko|dhajothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhajothoth|dhajothoth]] || [[word:dhajothoj|dhajothoj]] || [[word:dhajothosh|dhajothosh]] || [[word:dhajotho|dhajotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhajothothol|dhajothothol]] || [[word:dhajothojol|dhajothojol]] || [[word:dhajothoshol|dhajothoshol]] || [[word:dhajothokol|dhajothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhajothothotho|dhajothothotho]] || [[word:dhajothojojo|dhajothojojo]] || [[word:dhajothoshosho|dhajothoshosho]] || [[word:dhajothoko|dhajothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhajothothon|dhajothothon]] || [[word:dhajothojon|dhajothojon]] || [[word:dhajothoshon|dhajothoshon]] || [[word:dhajothokon|dhajothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhajothothoro|dhajothothoro]] || [[word:dhajothojoro|dhajothojoro]] || [[word:dhajothoshoro|dhajothoshoro]] || [[word:dhajothokoro|dhajothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
